heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 460w–7 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated not more than $5,250,000 for the acquisition of lands and interests in lands and not more than $5,000,000 for the development of the Apostle Islands National Lakeshore. Effective , there are authorized to be appropriated such additional sums as may be necessary for the acquisition of the lands described in .October 1, 1986section 460w(b) of this title
notes: Amendments1986— inserted provision authorizing additional sums to be appropriated as necessary for acquisition of lands described in .Pub. L. 99–497section 460w(b) of this title1974— substituted “$5,250,000” for “$4,250,000”.Pub. L. 93–477
amendments: Amendments1986— inserted provision authorizing additional sums to be appropriated as necessary for acquisition of lands described in .Pub. L. 99–497section 460w(b) of this title1974— substituted “$5,250,000” for “$4,250,000”.Pub. L. 93–477
